reading.title: Reading: Almost done
reading.passage: I have already finished the report. The store has just opened a few minutes ago. They haven't launched the new product yet, but it's coming soon.

questions.question: The new product has already launched.
questions.explanation: "They haven't launched the new product yet".

reading.title: Reading: For how long?
reading.passage: I have lived in this city for ten years. I have worked at this company since 2018. We haven't met for a long time because I have been busy for the last few months.

questions.question: Lived in the city for: ___ years
questions.explanation: "I have lived in this city for ten years."

questions.question: Since when has the writer worked at the company?
questions.explanation: "I have worked at this company since 2018."
